{{Infobox icon
| name = THE SHIP OF HEROES
| introduced = The Captain
}}

== The Captain ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[THE SHIP OF HEROES]] is the title of a book.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c5">''The Captain'', chapter 5</ref>}}

== The Engineer ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|The Ship of Heroes is a group that [[Starhammer]] can challenge.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c23">''The Engineer'', chapter 23</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|The Ship of Heroes is a comparison used for how [[Horizon]] went down.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c48">''The Engineer'', chapter 48</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|“All the better to challenge the Ship of Heroes, wouldn’t you say?”<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c23" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Icons]]
[[Category:The Captain]]
[[Category:The Engineer]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
